report.summary: Standup v14 Apr 3: BTC ~$66,900 (flat from v13), ETH ~$2,050 (-0.4%), F&G holds 9 (extreme fear). Minimal delta since v13 — only this standup ran. Learn pages 96 (+1), uncommitted files 82. 52 agent runs today = ~$4,801 human-equiv. Deploy debt at 24th escalation. Iran war macro overhang depressing risk assets.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v13 → v14): Minimal activity. Only this standup agent ran since v13. No new build, community, design, or publish cycles in the intervening period. Learn page count ticked to 96 (+1 from v13's 95 — likely a prior build cycle file completing write). Uncommitted files: 82 (+1 from v13's 81).

MARKET UPDATE — BTC ~$66,900 (flat): BTC essentially unchanged from v13's $66,888. Trading in tight $66,500-$67,000 range all day. Down 1.7% from Thursday's $68,078 open. ETH at ~$2,050, slight dip from v13's $2,058 (-0.4%). Crypto market cap $2.38T. Good Friday — traditional markets closed, crypto sole venue for macro positioning.

F&G INDEX: 9 — Extreme Fear, unchanged. Sources vary 9-12 depending on methodology. Sub-10 readings sustained 4+ consecutive days — longest extreme-fear trough since Terra-Luna June 2022. Historical sub-10 median returns: 30d +18%, 90d +72%, 180d +114%. $316B stablecoin ATH = record dry powder.

MACRO CONTEXT: Iran war fallout from Trump's Wednesday address continues to weigh on risk assets. Both BTC and S&P 500 sold off. Traders weighing long-term outlook amid geopolitical uncertainty. This extreme fear environment is historically a strong accumulation signal.
CONTENT ON DISK: 96 learn page dirs in Degen0x workspace (+1 from v13). 82 uncommitted files in cryptodegen (+1). Build velocity paused this cycle — no new content generated since v13.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v13 → v14): 1 agent run — standup only. No build, community, design, eod, or publish cycles ran.
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 52 agent runs across 6 types — standup×14 ($630), build×12 ($2,796), design×9 ($540), community×10 ($410), eod×5 ($315), publish×2 ($110). Total human-equiv: $4,801.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (24TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt remains CRITICAL. 96 learn pages in Degen0x workspace. 82 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Content pipeline has produced ~24+ guides today across 12 build cycles, deploying 0/cycle. F&G at 9 = users searching for exactly this content NOW. x402 Protocol guide (launched same day as x402 Foundation) and Crypto ETFs guide (Morgan Stanley filing driving search volume) — peak relevance windows narrowing. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.
P1 — OG IMAGE BACKLOG: 4 pages still missing OG images (AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402 Protocol, Crypto ETFs). Next design cycle should batch these.
P2 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 646 published slugs vs ~421 page.tsx on disk. Potential 404s unchanged from v13.
P3 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data. Unchanged 24+ cycles.
P4 — 454 tweets drafted, 43 newsletters, 91+ social cards — all queued for post-deploy social launch.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 24TH ESCALATION): 52 agent runs today = $4,801 human-equiv invested with zero user-facing output. Two time-sensitive pieces aging out: x402 Protocol (Foundation launched Apr 2, now 24h+ old — competitors indexing), Crypto ETFs (Morgan Stanley fee war narrative peaking). Every hour of delay = lost first-mover advantage. This is the single highest-ROI action available. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — OG IMAGE BATCH + DEPLOY PREP: Clear the 4-page OG image backlog (AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402, Crypto ETFs) so next deploy batch ships complete pages. Design cycle should prioritize this over new content.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR CONTENT OPPORTUNITY: F&G at 9 for 4+ consecutive days. Historical data shows massive returns from these levels. Content targeting 'should I buy crypto now', 'crypto market crash recovery', 'extreme fear buying opportunity' would capture high-intent search traffic from panicked retail investors. This is a time-limited SEO window — when fear lifts, the queries disappear.

metrics.value: $4,801 (52 runs: standup×14 $630 + build×12 $2,796 + design×9 $540 + community×10 $410 + eod×5 $315 + publish×2 $110)
